𝗬𝗢𝗨𝗧𝗛𝗨𝗕 | Watching YouTube videos directly from the terminal without using a web browser.  ✨ Notable!

❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Watching YouTube videos directly from the terminal without using a web browser.
📅 Created: May 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ TUI grid with previews
✅ Custom ffplay-yt player
✅ SponsorBlock integration
✅ 1080p video playback
✅ Direct SABR streaming
✅ YouTube search and recommendations
✅ OAuth for authentication
✅ Proxy support


❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐ 64 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 14 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 1 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

YouHub is a terminal-based YouTube client that allows users to browse, search, and watch YouTube videos directly from their console. It features a TUI grid interface, a custom ffplay-yt player, and integrates features like SponsorBlock for an ad-free experience without needing a web browser.

❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/HelpFreedom/youthub

𝗗𝗘𝗔𝗗𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗞𝗢𝗡𝗜𝗡𝗚 | To provide accurate and reliable location tracking on Android devices, especially in environments where GPS is not available or functional.  ✨ Notable!

•••••••••••••••••••••••

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: ☕ Java 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide accurate and reliable location tracking on Android devices, especially in environments where GPS is not available or functional.
📅 Created: Dec 2014 • Updated: Jun 2026

•••••••••••••••••••••••

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Real-time localization
✅ Uses inertial sensors (accelerometer, compass, gyro)
✅ GPS-independent tracking
✅ Offline functionality
✅ Self-sufficient location tracking


•••••••••••••••••••••••

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 221 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 58 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 1 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

•••••••••••••••••••••••

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Dead Reckoning is an Android application that provides real-time localization using a phone's inertial sensors, eliminating the need for GPS. It enables self-sufficient and offline location tracking, useful in environments where GPS signals are unreliable or unavailable.

•••••••••••••••••••••••

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/nisargnp/DeadReckoning

𝗕𝗥𝗔𝗡𝗖𝗛-𝗢𝗨𝗧𝗣𝗨𝗧 | To provide advanced, multi-output streaming and recording capabilities for OBS Studio, allowing users to send individual sources or scenes to different destinations with custom configurations.  🌟 Rising Fast!

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🔨 C++ 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide advanced, multi-output streaming and recording capabilities for OBS Studio, allowing users to send individual sources or scenes to different destinations with custom configurations.
📅 Created: Jul 2024 • Updated: Jun 2026

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Individual streaming and recording per source/scene
✅ Dedicated encoding settings per output
✅ Selectable audio sources per filter
✅ Automatic reconnection
✅ Stream recording with container format and division support
✅ Status dock for monitoring and control
✅ Interlinking with OBS Studio status
✅ Manual file splitting, pause/unpause recording, chapter markers
✅ Replay buffer per filter
✅ Video cropping and frame rate division
✅ Proc handler for save file name format override
✅ Various hotkeys for control


⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 178 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 22 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 16 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Branch Output is an OBS Studio plugin that enhances streaming and recording capabilities by allowing individual sources or scenes to be configured with dedicated encoding settings and audio sources. It provides advanced features like automatic reconnection, per-filter replay buffers, and manual file splitting, offering granular control over output streams.

⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆⋆

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/OPENSPHERE-Inc/branch-output

𝗖𝗟𝗔𝗨𝗗𝗘-𝗖𝗢𝗗𝗘-𝗚𝗔𝗠𝗘-𝗦𝗧𝗨𝗗𝗜𝗢𝗦 | To provide structure and organization to AI-assisted game development within a single Claude Code session, enabling a more efficient and professional workflow.  📈 Growing!

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 Shell 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide structure and organization to AI-assisted game development within a single Claude Code session, enabling a more efficient and professional workflow.
📅 Created: Feb 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ 49 specialized AI agents organized into a studio hierarchy (Directors, Department Leads, Specialists)
✅ 73 workflow skills (slash commands) for all phases of game development
✅ 12 automated hooks for validation on commits, pushes, asset changes, and more
✅ 11 path-scoped rules for enforcing coding standards
✅ 41 document templates for GDDs, UX specs, ADRs, sprint plans, etc.
✅ Mimics real studio hierarchy for structured AI-assisted development


✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 21K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 3.1K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 25 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Claude Code Game Studios transforms a single Claude Code session into a structured, multi-agent game development studio. It organizes AI agents into a hierarchy with specialized roles and skills, mirroring a real studio's workflow to improve project organization, catch errors early, and maintain project vision.

✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱✱

𝗚𝗘𝗡𝗘𝗥𝗜𝗖𝗔𝗚𝗘𝗡𝗧 | Enabling Large Language Models (LLMs) to autonomously control and interact with local computer systems, automating tasks and evolving capabilities over time.  🌟 Rising Fast!

╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Enabling Large Language Models (LLMs) to autonomously control and interact with local computer systems, automating tasks and evolving capabilities over time.
📅 Created: Jan 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Self-Evolving: Automatically crystallizes tasks into reusable Skills, growing a personal skill tree.
✅ Minimal Architecture: Core code is ~3K lines, Agent Loop is ~100 lines, with no complex dependencies.
✅ Strong Execution: Injects into real browsers and uses 9 atomic tools for direct system control.
✅ High Compatibility: Supports major LLMs (Claude, Gemini, etc.) and is cross-platform.
✅ Token Efficient: Operates within a <30K context window, reducing cost and hallucinations.


╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 12.6K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 1.5K 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 74 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

GenericAgent is a Python framework for creating self-evolving autonomous AI agents. It allows LLMs to control local computer systems through a minimal set of tools and an agent loop, automatically learning and growing its capabilities into a personal skill tree with each task it completes.

╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/lsdefine/GenericAgent
